steps.title: Read intercepts
steps.content: From the graph, the line crosses the x‑axis at (3,0) and the y‑axis at (0,−5).

steps.title: Derive equation from intercepts
steps.content: Using intercept form $$ rac{x}{3} + rac{y}{-5} = 1$$ multiply both sides by 15: $$5x - 3y = 15.$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
